articles.headline: Ronaldo scores 1st KO stage goal before super-sub Ramos rises late
articles.description: Ivan Perišić put Croatia ahead before Cristiano Ronaldo levelled from the spot, with Gonçalo Ramos rising in added time to snatch victory for Portugal.
